---
title: "restaurant"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(osmdata)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tigris)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r}
# Step 1: Load Maryland counties shapefile
md_counties <- counties(state = "MD", cb = TRUE, class = "sf")

# Step 2: Build Overpass query for restaurants
q <- opq(bbox = st_bbox(md_counties)) %>%
  add_osm_feature(key = "amenity", value = "restaurant")

# Step 3: Fetch restaurant data
osm_restaurants <- osmdata_sf(q)

# Step 4: Convert to sf POINTS layer
restaurant_points <- osm_restaurants$osm_points

# Step 5: CRS fix — transform counties to match restaurant points
md_counties <- st_transform(md_counties, st_crs(restaurant_points))

# Step 6: Spatial join — assign each restaurant to a county
restaurant_counties <- st_join(restaurant_points, md_counties, join = st_within)

# Step 7: Count restaurants by county
counts <- restaurant_counties %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  count(NAME) %>%
  rename(county = NAME, restaurant_count = n)

# Step 8: Print or plot results
print(counts)
```
